message:
🌱 Add cortex: Query across multiple users / tenants / instances mission (#1324)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cortex-923-query-across-multiple-users-tenants-instances",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cortex: Query across multiple users / tenants / instances",
+    "description": "Query across multiple users / tenants / instances. Requested by 12+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cortex deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your cortex version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cortex -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cortex\nhelm list -n cortex 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working cortex installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cortex configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cortex configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cortex -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cortex\nkubectl get configmap -n cortex -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cortex\n```\nAs an administrator, I would like to query metrics that exist in multiple tenants.  For example  `prometheus_remote_storage_shards` - I'd like to see what the typical range is, look for outliers."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Query across multiple users / tenants / instances",
+        "description": "- This intends to allow cross tenant querying. The implemenation follows this [proposal]\n\n[proposal]: https://cortexmetrics.io/docs/proposals/cross-tenant-query-federation/\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cortex -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cortex\nkubectl get events -n cortex --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Query across multiple users / tenants / instances\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "- This intends to allow cross tenant querying. The implemenation follows this [proposal]\n\n[proposal]: https://cortexmetrics.io/docs/proposals/cross-tenant-query-federation/",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cortex",
+      "incubating",

+      "feature"
+    ],

+    ],

+      "pr": "https://github.com/cortexproject/cortex/pull/3250"
+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
